title: 부사절 (시간, 이유, 조건, 양보)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 부사절을 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 우리말로 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: When you are in Rome, do as the Romans do.

answer.analysis: [When you are in Rome], do as the Romans do.
answer.translation: 로마에 있을 때는, 로마인들이 하는 대로 해라.

problems.stem: I couldn't go to the party because I had a cold.

answer.analysis: I couldn't go to the party [because I had a cold].
answer.translation: 나는 감기에 걸렸기 때문에 파티에 갈 수 없었다.

problems.stem: If you need my help, please let me know.

answer.analysis: [If you need my help], please let me know.
answer.translation: 만약 내 도움이 필요하면, 내게 알려줘.

problems.stem: Although he tried his best, he failed the exam.

answer.analysis: [Although he tried his best], he failed the exam.
answer.translation: 비록 그는 최선을 다했지만, 시험에 떨어졌다.

problems.stem: I will wait here until you come back.

answer.analysis: I will wait here [until you come back].
answer.translation: 나는 네가 돌아올 때까지 여기서 기다릴 것이다.

problems.stem: He started to learn guitar after he watched the movie.

answer.analysis: He started to learn guitar [after he watched the movie].
answer.translation: 그는 그 영화를 본 후에 기타를 배우기 시작

problems.stem: As I have no money, I cannot buy it.

answer.analysis: 했다. [As I have no money], I cannot buy it.
answer.translation: 나는 돈이 없기 때문에, 그것을 살 수 없다.

problems.stem: You will succeed if you don't give up.

answer.analysis: You will succeed [if you don't give up].
answer.translation: 만약 네가 포기하지 않는다면, 너는 성공할 것이다.

problems.stem: While she was cooking, her husband was cleaning the house.

answer.analysis: [While she was cooking], her husband was cleaning the house.

problems.stem: He looks young though he is over forty.

answer.analysis: 은 집을 청소하고 있었다. He looks young [though he is over forty].
